qry:select.name: QRY_UNIFORME
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG16_UNIFORMES.oi_uniforme, ORG16_UNIFORMES.c_uniforme, ORG16_UNIFORMES.d_uniforme, ORG16_UNIFORMES.n_valor, ORG16_UNIFORMES.e_duracion, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO.d_unidad_tiempo, ORG16_UNIFORMES.e_recuento_stock, ORG16_UNIFORMES.f_ult_rec_stock FROM ORG16_UNIFORMES, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO JOIN ORG16_UNIFORMES.oi_unidad_tiempo LEFT OUTER ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO.oi_unidad_tiempo ORDER BY c_uniforme ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT MAX(ORG16_UNIF_REC.f_recuento) as f_recuento, ORG16_UNIF_REC.e_cantidad as cant FROM ORG16_UNIF_REC, ORG16_UNIFORMES JOIN ORG16_UNIFORMES.oi_uniforme INNER ORG16_UNIF_REC.oi_uniforme WHERE ORG16_UNIFORMES.c_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@code} GROUP BY ORG16_UNIF_REC.e_cantidad ORDER BY f_recuento ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(PER02_UNIF_PER.e_cantidad) as cant FROM PER02_UNIF_PER, ORG16_UNIFORMES JOIN ORG16_UNIFORMES.oi_uniforme INNER PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme WHERE ORG16_UNIFORMES.c_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@code} AND PER02_UNIF_PER.f_desde >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_recuento)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2_1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(PER02_DEV_UNIF.e_cantidad) as cant FROM PER02_DEV_UNIF, PER02_UNIF_PER, ORG16_UNIFORMES JOIN ORG16_UNIFORMES.oi_uniforme INNER PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme, PER02_DEV_UNIF.oi_uniforme_per INNER PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme_per WHERE PER02_DEV_UNIF.l_repone_stock = 1 AND ORG16_UNIFORMES.c_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@code} AND PER02_DEV_UNIF.f_dev_unif >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_recuento)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(ORG16_UNIF_REP.e_cant_repuesta) as cant FROM ORG16_UNIF_REP, ORG16_UNIFORMES JOIN ORG16_UNIFORMES.oi_uniforme INNER ORG16_UNIF_REP.oi_uniforme WHERE ORG16_UNIFORMES.c_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@code} AND ORG16_UNIF_REP.f_reposicion >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_recuento)} ')/ROWS/ROW
